steps.title: Recognize that A(b) is a function of the base
steps.content: The function $A(b) = 6b^2$ takes the base length $b$ (in cm) as input and outputs the area (in cm²). The problem directly states that the function $A(b)$ gives the area if the length of its base is $b$ cm.

steps.title: Interpret A(17) = 1,734 to find the base and area
steps.content: When $A(17) = 1,734$, the input is $b = 17$ and the output is 1,734. Since $A(b)$ represents area, this means: base = 17 cm and area = 1,734 cm². That confirms C is correct.
